known_evidence: Title-validated Dryad archive yields separate early-season floral redness and floral condensed-tannin measures plus individual plant pollinator-rate, natural florivory, CH fruit, and seed components. Four HC3 treatment-adjusted observational trait-path effects were extracted.
main_uncertainty: Floral condensed tannins remain a barrier candidate rather than a manipulated defense; all four trait paths are observational. CH fitness components are not a total reproductive-fitness surface.
required_source: Title-validated Dryad archive plus predeclared model configuration
next_action: Retain four effect records in scale-specific synthesis. Do not treat as causal trait-manipulation evidence, D2/D3 evidence, or direct c_AD calibration.

known_evidence: Open article and Mendeley public data package; nectar, visitation/pollination, florivory and reproductive outcomes reported.
main_uncertainty: The experiments manipulate visitor access and corolla damage, not an independently measured A or B trait; latex/ants are mechanism explanations rather than plant-level B variables.
required_source: Article methods and Mendeley public package
next_action: Retain in direct-case/M2 ledger; re-screen only if the public raw package contains a predeclared trait-level model with recoverable uncertainty.

known_evidence: Later Dryad package 10.5061/dryad.0k6djh9xx exposes 16 recoverable population-year table headers with repeated patch/Blossom/ID fields and morphology, pollen/resin, and seed-predation columns.
main_uncertainty: DataCite declares the 2013 article only as IsCitedBy, so the later package is not confirmed as the original article supplement. Trait functions and the semantics of cross-table keys are also not yet primary-source verified.
required_source: DataCite relation plus package-specific methods or source article for the later data release
next_action: Retain as M0 high-information secondary linked package. Do not extract effects, assign B_flower, or cite it as the 2013 article's raw panel until source relation and trait function are verified.

known_evidence: Full text reports exsertion/lip traits with stigmatic pollen and pre-dispersal seed predation.
main_uncertainty: Exsertion conflates flower length and bract height; public supplement is aggregate rather than recoverable individual table.
next_action: Retain as M2 mechanism evidence; do not enter quantitative registry unless a recoverable individual or declared aggregate effect/SE is confirmed.

known_evidence: Full text measures floral production, size, volatiles and pollen chemistry with florivorous beetle response. No pollination response was measured.
main_uncertainty: The public screen does not recover a direct floral-trait effect estimate with uncertainty and declared exposure; floral terpenoids are not established as a flower-specific B trait.
required_source: Full-text screen note and M1 study card
next_action: Retain as one-channel floral-trait × florivore mechanism evidence. Do not enter four-path registry or reopen unless a table with eligible direct effect data is recovered.

known_evidence: Exact DOI metadata and two Wiley content links were recovered. Public unauthenticated access probe found TDM HTTP 400 (token required) and direct PDF HTTP 403. OpenAlex reported no OA full text. The sole Dryad search candidate was an unrelated tree-regeneration dataset.
main_uncertainty: No public article table, supplement, or verified related data package is recoverable. Independent floral B trait remains unknown because methods are inaccessible.
required_source: Public full text or verified article-linked data package
next_action: Retain as M0 bibliographic candidate. Do not enter an effect record or contact authors before the complete public-only candidate-universe screen ends and D1=0 is established.

known_evidence: Exact Crossref metadata and a publisher content URL were recovered; title/metadata indicate floral traits, sequential fitness components, pollination relevance, and seed predation.
main_uncertainty: No open full text, accessible publisher PDF, verified article-linked data package, or public table with effect uncertainty and denominators is recoverable. Earlier generic Dryad search output was not relation-verified.
required_source: Verified public article table or article-linked data package
next_action: Retain as an M0 bibliographic candidate. Do not enter an effect record, infer coefficients from title/metadata, or treat the unverified Dryad search hit as data.

known_evidence: Article-declared Dryad DOI 10.5061/dryad.dj40r and matching Data from: package title support a transparent provenance contract. The direct archive audit recovered individual floral scent/display, herbivory, and reproductive-success tables. A predeclared same-day total-scent to eaten-flowers model yielded log OR 0.568 (95% CI 0.042 to 1.094; p=0.034; n=1162; 13 population-year strata; quasi-binomial dispersion 8.386).
main_uncertainty: The record is observational and scale-specific. DataCite relation type IsCitedBy remains a provenance caveat. Pollinator outcomes are population-date rather than individual, and no independent B_flower trait is identified.
required_source: Registered effect plus protocol and archive audits
next_action: Retain the A_to_antagonism log-odds record as observational scale-specific synthesis evidence. Do not use it as causal defence evidence, a direct theory parameter, individual A_to_pollination, or a D1 basis. Prioritize independent B_to_antagonism and individual A_to_pollination source studies.
